rationale: The citation to Nikolova and Inman (2015) is used as an example that simplified in-store nutrition scoring can nudge healthier choices, mainly in the implications/discussion sections. The citing paper does not build its identification strategy, hypotheses, or core empirical models on that study, and it does not reuse its method in a direct way. The main contribution is about minimum wage effects on calories and nutrition, so this reference functions as supporting background rather than a central intellectual input.
